title: Termination, Budgets, Timeouts, and Progress Detection · Failure Case: Resource Budgets
summary: Stop an agent safely under success, failure, budget, and no-progress conditions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops resource budgets increment in a loop termination and budget policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Budget turns, tokens, time, tool calls, money, and external side effects.
Classify retryable, recoverable, authority-blocked, and terminal failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
